statements.statement: MATCH ()-[r]->() RETURN type(r) as relationship, count(r) as count
MATCH (p:Person) RETURN p.name, p.title, p.addressCity, p.addressProvince, p.phonePrimary, p.bio ORDER BY p.birthDate
MATCH (head:Person)-[:MARRIED_TO {isCurrent: true}]-(wife) RETURN head.name as husband, wife.name as wife, head.phonePrimary as husbandPhone, wife.phonePrimary as wifePhone
MATCH path = (head:Person)-[:PARENT_OF*0..2]->(descendant) WHERE head.name = 'Budi Santoso' RETURN [node IN nodes(path) | node.name] as treePath
